purpose: Initializes program variables by reading current date, parameters from SYSIN, and setting default values for expiry days, checkpoint frequencies, and debug flag.
Displays a debug message with the count of summary records read if debug mode is enabled.
Retrieves the next pending authorization detail record via IMS GNP call, updates read counter and control flags based on retrieval status.
Checks if the current authorization detail is expired based on date difference and updates counts accordingly, marking it for deletion if expired.
Deletes the current authorization detail segment via IMS DLET call and increments the deletion counter if successful, otherwise abends.
Reads the next pending authorization detail record from the IMS database and updates counters and flags accordingly.
Deletes the current pending authorization summary record from the IMS database and increments the deletion counter if successful.
Takes an IMS checkpoint and displays success or failure based on the current authorization processing count and application ID.
Displays a debug message with the current count of authorization summaries read if debug mode is enabled.
Takes an IMS checkpoint and displays success or failure based on the current authorization processing count and application ID.
Abends the program with return code 16 when called.
Abends the program with return code 16 upon failure to read an authorization detail segment.
Abends the program with return code 16 if deletion of an authorization detail segment fails.
Abends the program with return code 16 if deletion of an authorization summary segment fails.
Abends the program with return code 16 if the checkpoint operation fails.
